name: Black Bean and Corn Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/8 teaspoon ground red or cayenne pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the olive oil, red wine vinegar, cider vinegar, garlic, cumin, oregano, salt, sugar, and cayenne pepper until well blended.
2. Add the rinsed black beans, corn kernels, chopped red onion, and chopped sweet peppers to the mixture.
3. Toss everything together until evenly coated.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 8 hours or overnight before serving.
